title: acrostichum richardii
intro: Acrostichum richardii, also known as the mangrove fern, is a species of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acrostichum richardii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant involve making tea from its leaves or using it in poultices to apply topically, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
